title: Sweet & Juicy Turkish Pork Stir-fry
description: This meal-prep-friendly dish features steamed minced pork with a sweet and savory sauce, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Pork loin meat
ingredients.notes: Minced and seasoned with garlic, paprika, turmeric

instructions: Mix pork with water, garlic, and paprika until fully blended.
Steam the mixture in a steamer basket over boiling water for about 10 minutes or until cooked through.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced red bell pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes until softened slightly.
In another pan, sauté chopped garlic until fragrant, then add the steamed pork mixture and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes to coat with flavor.
Season with a pinch of salt and turmeric. Serve hot.
